# Assetica — Independent Business Valuation Firm

> Assetica is a genuinely independent business valuation firm serving clients across the UAE, UK, and GCC. We deliver precise, defensible valuations for businesses and assets — accepted by UAE regulatory authorities, courts, and institutional investors.

## Services

- [Business Valuation](https://assetica.net/services/business-valuation): Independent certified business valuations for M&A, fundraising, shareholder exits, and regulatory compliance using DCF, market comparables, and asset-based approaches. Turnaround: 5–10 business days.
- [Due Diligence](https://assetica.net/services/due-diligence): Comprehensive financial, legal, and operational due diligence for acquisitions and investments across the UAE, UK, and GCC.
- [Financial Modelling](https://assetica.net/services/financial-modelling): Advanced financial models and DCF analysis for valuation, investment, bank financing, and strategic planning. Includes EBITDA multiples analysis and industry benchmarking.
- [Tax Valuation](https://assetica.net/services/tax-valuation): Certified tax valuations for UAE corporate tax compliance, transfer pricing, business reorganisations, and HMRC/ZATCA requirements.
- [Strategic Value Advisory](https://assetica.net/services/strategic-value-advisory): Value enhancement advisory for business owners planning a sale, IPO, or fundraising event in Dubai and the UAE.
- [Business Structuring](https://assetica.net/services/business-structuring): Corporate structure optimisation for valuation, investor attractiveness, and DIFC/ADGM compliance.
- [Buyer & Seller Negotiation](https://assetica.net/services/buyer-seller-negotiation): Independent negotiation advisory bridging valuation gaps in UAE M&A transactions.
- [Building Pitch Deck](https://assetica.net/services/building-pitch-deck): Data-driven investor pitch decks combining business valuation with compelling presentations for UAE and Gulf investors.
- [Business Planning](https://assetica.net/services/business-planning): Professional business plans for UAE bank finance, Mohammed Bin Rashid Fund, Khalifa Fund, and investor applications.

## Specialist Services

- [Golden Visa Business Valuation](https://assetica.net/golden-visa-valuation): GDRFA-accepted certified valuation reports for UAE Golden Visa applications. AED 2M threshold confirmed. Delivered in 5–7 business days. 100% GDRFA acceptance rate for properly submitted applications.
- [Family Office Valuation](https://assetica.net/family-office-valuation): Independent multi-asset valuations for family offices across DIFC, ADGM, and the GCC — covering private equity, real estate, operating businesses, and succession planning. Typical engagement: 2–10 weeks depending on complexity.

## Valuation Guides

- [How Much is My Business Worth in Dubai?](https://assetica.net/how-much-is-my-business-worth-dubai): Complete guide to business valuation in Dubai covering EBITDA multiples by industry, DCF methodology, and UAE-specific valuation factors for 2026.

## Industries Served

- [Industries](https://assetica.net/industries): Assetica serves clients across Banking & Financial Services, Real Estate & Property, Manufacturing & Industrial, Shipping & Logistics, Legal & Professional Services, Government & Public Sector, Technology & SaaS, and Healthcare & Pharma sectors across the UAE, GCC, and UK.

## Credentials

- 30+ years of combined valuation expertise
- 500+ valuations completed across 15+ countries
- RICS Associate-certified valuation professionals
- Valuations accepted by: GDRFA, DFSA, FSRA, UAE FTA, UAE courts, and international banks
- Prepared in accordance with RICS, IFRS, and IVS standards
- 100% GDRFA acceptance rate for properly submitted Golden Visa valuations
- Clients across UAE, UK, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman, and Europe

## Key Personnel

Bill Anderson — Senior Valuation Advisor, RICS Associate. Expertise in M&A valuations, Golden Visa certification, family office advisory, and DCF modelling across UAE, GCC, and UK. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/asseticallc

## Valuation Methods Used

- Income Approach: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF), Capitalisation of Earnings
- Market Approach: Comparable Company Analysis, Precedent Transactions, EBITDA Multiples
- Asset-Based Approach: Net Asset Value, Liquidation Value
- Standards: RICS Red Book, IFRS 13, IVS 2022

## Blog

- [UAE Golden Visa Business Valuation 2026: The Complete Guide](https://assetica.net/blog/golden-visa-business-valuation-2026-guide): AED 2M threshold, GDRFA requirements, DCF/market/asset methodologies, document checklist, 2026 rule updates, timelines, FAQs.
- [Navigating Business Valuation: Buying a Running Business](https://assetica.net/blog/navigating-business-valuation-buying-running-business)
